parameters.content: Connector template for VS Code::push_workspace_stub. Fill placeholder env vars before execution.

parameters.jsCode: return [{json:{"service_name":"vscode","display_name":"VS Code","operation_id":"push_workspace_stub","method":"POST","base_url":"{$env.VSCODE_BRIDGE_URL}","path":"/v1/workspace/sync","url":"{$env.VSCODE_BRIDGE_URL}/v1/workspace/sync","headers":{"Authorization":"Bearer {$env.VSCODE_ACCESS_TOKEN}"},"body":{"workspace_path":"__VSCODE_WORKSPACE_PATH__","files":[]},"query":{},"integration_mode":"workspace_bridge","status":"placeholder_only","credential_placeholders":["VSCODE_BRIDGE_URL","VSCODE_ACCESS_TOKEN","VSCODE_WORKSPACE_PATH"],"notes":"Workspace file export bridge; keep generated workflow JSON and docs ready for repository or extension-based sync."}}];
return [{json:{status:'placeholder_only', service:$json.service_name, operation:$json.operation_id, integration_mode:$json.integration_mode, body:$json.body, notes:$json.notes}}];
